reasoning: The Indiana Pacers are a strong team, coming off an Eastern Conference Finals appearance and returning their core of Tyrese Haliburton and Pascal Siakam. However, they compete in a tough Central Division alongside the Milwaukee Bucks (led by Giannis Antetokounmpo) and the Cleveland Cavaliers (led by Donovan Mitchell), both of whom had better regular-season records than the Pacers last year and typically have higher or similar odds to win the division in the nearer term. Looking ahead to the 2025-2026 season adds variance, but Indiana is likely going to be the 2nd or 3rd favorite in the division behind Milwaukee and Cleveland, giving them roughly a 20-30% chance to win the Central Division.
